name: Soft Kitten Call
nameJa: やさしい子猫の呼び声
description: Soft kitten mewing sound that attracts adult cats
descriptionZh: 轻柔的小猫叫声，吸引成年猫咪
descriptionJa: 成猫を引き寄せる優しい子猫の鳴き声

name: Playful Kitten Sounds
description: Playful kitten sounds for curious cats
descriptionZh: 活泼的小猫声音，吸引好奇的猫咪
descriptionJa: 好奇心の強い猫を引き寄せる遊び好きな子猫の声

name: Urgent Kitten Call
nameJa: 急ぎめの子猫の呼び声
description: Short, repeated kitten calls for cats that respond to sharper meows
descriptionZh: 短促、连续的小猫呼唤，适合会回应尖细叫声的猫咪
descriptionJa: 短く繰り返す子猫の声。高めの鳴き声に反応する猫向け

name: Long Kitten Meow
description: Longer kitten meows with a softer, drawn-out tone
descriptionZh: 拖长的小猫叫声，语气更柔和、持续更久
descriptionJa: やわらかく長めに続く子猫の鳴き声

name: Busy Kitten Meows
nameJa: にぎやかな子猫の鳴き声
description: Denser kitten meows with more movement and variation
descriptionZh: 更密集的小猫叫声，变化更多、存在感更强
descriptionJa: 変化が多く、存在感のある子猫の鳴き声

name: Can Lid Rattle
description: Metal can lid being moved or rattled, useful for cats that react to can sounds
descriptionZh: 拨动罐头盖或金属边缘的轻响，适合对罐头声音敏感的猫咪
descriptionJa: 缶のふたや金属の縁を動かす音。缶の音に反応する猫向け

name: Feeder Kibble Sound
nameJa: フィーダーのキブル音
description: Sound of dry kibble being dispensed from automatic feeder
descriptionZh: 自动喂食器投放干粮的声音
descriptionJa: 自動給餌器からドライフードが出てくる音

name: Toy Bell Sound
description: Gentle bell sound from cat toys that sparks curiosity
descriptionZh: 猫咪玩具上的轻柔铃铛声，激发好奇心
descriptionJa: 好奇心を刺激する猫のおもちゃの優しい鈴の音

name: Can Opening Sound
description: The familiar sound of a can being opened with a can opener
descriptionZh: 用开罐器打开罐头时的熟悉声音
descriptionJa: 缶切りで缶を開けるときの慣れた音
